entries.name: attribution-rollup-campaigns-hourly
entries.purpose: Hourly at :05: pre-aggregate campaign performance into rollup cache per tenant with attribution_rollup entitlement. Skipped for tenants without the entitlement.

entries.name: attribution-mark-churned-daily
entries.purpose: Daily 02:00 UTC: transition subjects with no touchpoint in 90+ days from anonymous | identified → churned. Fires AttributionChurned + batches AttributionChurnDetectedNotification for the marketing role.

entries.name: attribution-reconcile-counts-nightly
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC: audit sweep. Recompute touchpoint_count + conversion_touchpoint_count from actual attribution_touchpoints rows. Every finding is a data-integrity signal (should be 0).

entries.name: attribution-purge-archived-daily
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: hard-purge soft-deleted attributions past retention + touchpoints past retention (730d default, 2555d on Enterprise). Also completes the reset audit hold — touchpoints past their 90-day hold are hard-deleted, firing AttributionResetConfirmed.

entries.name: attribution-expiry-notifier-weekly
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 08:00 UTC: fires 7 days before a tenant's touchpoint retention window would purge a large batch. Notifies the tenant admin so they can request an export or upgrade to attribution_touchpoint_retention_extended.

entries.name: attribution-consent-suppression-daily-digest
entries.purpose: Daily 09:00 UTC: batched digest of AttributionSuppressedByConsent events for the previous 24h. Sent to compliance-role recipients per attribution.consent.suppression_notification_frequency config.
